summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Human Resources professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing people programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Partnered with the HRBP team to deliver strategic HR solutions across {ex|employee relations}, headcount, and succession planning
Assisted in {ex|employee relations} cases, balancing empathy for individuals with what was right for the business and ensuring compliance
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop coaching 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding and {coord|people processes} across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Led a {prog|manager effectiveness} initiative, transforming {data|people data} into actionable reports that surfaced themes and risks for leaders
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to share proactive insights and guide C-suite decisions on retention and engagement
Provided consultations on {prog|performance review}, DEI, and Inclusive Leadership to strengthen managers and team performance
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Partner {cross|cross-functionally} with GTM-adjacent Sales, Marketing, and Tech leaders to build and scale high-performing teams
Coach managers and {cross|stakeholders} through change, refining {coord|people programs} for 70+ staff and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate listening sessions with 25 global {cross|stakeholders} to surface themes and address issues proactively
Facilitate training for 600+ participants, boosting {prog|development} and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to {prog|performance management}
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
